mapper.select:
select a.s_emp_record_id,a.actual_work_day,a.need_work_day, b.employee_name,b.employee_id,b.post,c.name as deptName,b.job_number from hrm_salary_month_emp_record a left join hrm_employee b on a.employee_id = b.employee_id left join hrm_dept c on b.dept_id = c.dept_id left join hrm_salary_month_record e on a.s_record_id = e.s_record_id where a.s_record_id = #{data.sRecordId} and b.is_del = 0
and a.employee_id in
#{employeeId}
and 1=2
and b.employee_id = #{data.employeeId}
and b.employee_name like concat('%',#{data.employeeName},'%')
and b.dept_id = #{data.deptId}
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 1)
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 2)
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 3)
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 4)
order by c.dept_id

select ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.sortno,b.sortno) xh,a.s_emp_record_id,a.actual_work_day,a.need_work_day,date_format(b.entry_time,'%Y-%m-%d') as entryTime, case when sex=1 then '男' when sex=2 then '女' end as sex, case when c.name in ('质量部','仓库','质检部','设备技术部','生产部','仓储部','研发部','工程部') then '1' else '0' end as isProduceDept, b.employee_name,b.employee_id,b.post,c.name as deptName,b.job_number from hrm_salary_month_emp_record a left join hrm_employee b on a.employee_id = b.employee_id left join hrm_dept c on b.dept_id = c.dept_id left join hrm_salary_month_record e on a.s_record_id = e.s_record_id where a.s_record_id = #{data.sRecordId} and b.is_del = 0
and a.employee_id in
#{employeeId}
and 1=2
and b.employee_id = #{data.employeeId}
and b.employee_name like concat('%',#{data.employeeName},'%')
and b.dept_id = #{data.deptId}
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 1)
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 2)
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 3)
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 4)
order by b.dept_id desc, b.sortno asc

select a.s_emp_record_id from hrm_salary_month_emp_record a left join hrm_employee b on a.employee_id = b.employee_id left join hrm_dept c on b.dept_id = c.dept_id left join hrm_salary_month_record e on a.s_record_id = e.s_record_id where a.s_record_id = #{data.sRecordId} and b.is_del = 0
and a.employee_id in
#{employeeId}
and 1=2
and b.employee_id = #{data.employeeId}
and b.employee_name like concat('%',#{data.employeeName},'%')
and b.dept_id = #{data.deptId}
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 1)
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 2)
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 3)
and a.employee_id in (select d.employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record d where change_time BETWEEN e.start_time AND e.end_time and type = 4)

select a.s_emp_record_id, a.year, a.month, b.start_time, b.end_time from hrm_salary_month_emp_record a left join hrm_salary_month_record b on a.s_record_id = b.s_record_id where a.employee_id = #{employeeId} and b.check_status = 10 order by a.create_time desc
